name: Get Transactions
description: Fetches transactions from the finance database for a given date range. Use this when the user asks about recent transactions, spending, purchases, or financial activity over a time period.
author: Michael

start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 90 days ago if not specified.

end_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today if not specified.
